name: UCLA

confRecord.note: 2025 Big Ten Tournament Champions — beat Michigan 5-0. 4th seed. Solans Ormo hat trick.

acuAlignNote: Strong — no named kinesiology major but Physiol Sci covers anatomy, physiology, biomechanics fully. Motor control/development less explicit.

gpa.note: Highly selective public — aim 3.5+ for strong admission. Athletic scholarship may offset GPA concern.

fin.internationalNote: UCLA out-of-state COA is ~$73k/yr (2025-26). UC regents approved a $3,402 nonresident tuition increase pushing tuition to $52,536. International students not eligible for federal or CA state aid. Athletic scholarship is the primary lever — can cover up to 80% of costs.

culture.vibe: Vibrant, diverse, high-energy West Coast university culture. UCLA is one of the most socially active campuses in the USA — always something happening. Greek life is prominent but not dominant. International students are common and blend seamlessly.
culture.thingsToDo: Santa Monica Beach (10 min), Venice Beach, Westwood Village restaurants and cinema, Griffith Observatory, LA nightlife, Dodgers/Lakers/Rams games, concerts at the Forum, hiking in the Santa Monica Mountains, Disneyland (45 min). LA is limitless.
culture.socialScene: Large international student body. Australian students have established communities. Bruin athletics culture is intense — games are events. Social media presence huge. Campus feels alive 24/7.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★★★ Best campus lifestyle match in guide for Olivier. City, beach, warm, diverse. Feels closest to Sydney energy of any US campus.

facilityDetails.stadium: Drake Stadium — 8,000 capacity, FieldTurf surface, permanent seating, stadium lighting, video board. Shared with track & field, maintained to Big Ten broadcast standards.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 3 dedicated practice fields adjacent to Drake Stadium (2x natural grass, 1x FieldTurf). Ball-wall training walls, rebounder nets, GPS tracking zones marked on all surfaces.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: Acosta Athletic Center — 20,000 sq ft dedicated athlete weight room. Olympic lifting platforms (12), squat racks, cable systems, battle ropes, sled tracks. Olympic sports strength coach assigned exclusively to soccer. Cryotherapy chambers, hot/cold plunge pools, normatec recovery boots.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: Biomotion Lab (3D motion capture — 24-camera Vicon system), Biomechanics Research Lab (force plates, EMG systems), UCLA Exercise Physiology Lab (VO2 max, lactate testing), GPS/accelerometer tracking (Catapult) on all training sessions. One of the top 3 sports science environments in the NCAA.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: UCLA Health dedicated athletic trainer assigned to soccer. On-site physio room, rehabilitation gym, ultrasound, laser therapy, cryotherapy. UCLA Health orthopaedic surgery access (Dr Neal ElAttrache — team physician to LA Lakers).
facilityDetails.academicLabs: Department of Physiological Science: 6 research labs including cardiopulmonary physiology, muscle physiology, biomechanics, and neuroscience. Access to David Geffen School of Medicine anatomy cadaver lab. Student pre-PT club has first-priority clinical placement at UCLA Health.
facilityDetails.extras: Pauley Pavilion athlete lounge and recovery centre. LAFC training facility access (professional relationship). LA Galaxy El Camino College training facility visits. Olympic-standard athlete dining hall. Dedicated locker room for soccer with iPad film stations.
facilityDetails.note: UCLA is a top-3 facilities environment in the entire guide. The combination of Drake Stadium, the Biomotion Lab, and UCLA Health access creates a professional-standard training environment that rivals many MLS clubs.

coach.name: Ryan Jorden
coach.title: Head Coach (7th season 2025)
coach.profile: 7th season at UCLA 2025. 150-113-35 (.562) overall record. 13 MLS draftees. PhD Biomechanics from Northern Colorado. Won 2025 Big Ten Tournament over Michigan 5-0. USSF A License. Former Pacific Tigers HC — led largest single-season D1 turnaround. NCCAA National CoY 2011 and 2012 at Cal Baptist.

rec: LA lifestyle closest to Sydney. #1 Kinesiology equivalent nationally. Highly competitive for international athletes — elite highlights required. Extraordinary PT/Chiro grad school access via UCLA Health.

minutesOutlook.trajectoryNote: Yr1/Yr2 flat: 4 rising juniors present, 1 senior clears Yr2. Medium risk means steady not volatile path.

staff.name: Sergi Nus
staff.bg: Full-time assistant. Recruiting and player development.

staff.name: Erik Holt
staff.bg: Hired Jan 2026. UCLA alum and former team captain. 6-yr MLS career with Real Salt Lake. Previously assistant at LMU 2025.

name: Indiana

confRecord.note: Missed Big Ten Tournament. At-large NCAA bid. Palmer Ault led attack.

proPlayers.draftRank: Top 10 all-time. Most decorated program in US college soccer history.

degreeTitle: B.S. in Kinesiology — Exercise Science Major
acuAlignNote: Near-full alignment — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, motor control (dedicated lab), motor development, resistance training, sport psych, research, internship. Best motor control coverage of any program in guide.

gpa.note: Indiana is manageable for international athletes with a strong athletic profile. GPA 2.8 borderline.

fin.internationalNote: IU Bloomington out-of-state COA is ~$60k/yr (2025-26). Tuition+fees ~$42k for non-residents. Big Ten athletic aid can be significant. Academic merit available. Bloomington living costs are modest vs coastal cities — aids budget.

culture.vibe: Classic American Big Ten college-town atmosphere at its absolute finest. Bloomington is a college town that punches above its weight — vibrant music scene, excellent restaurants, beautiful forested campus, and intense Hoosiers sports culture.
culture.thingsToDo: Sample Gates and historic campus walks, Lake Monroe hiking and watersports, Brown County State Park (stunning fall foliage), Indianapolis day trips (1hr), IU Auditorium world-class concerts, Little 500 bike race (legendary). Bloomington is surprisingly fun.
culture.socialScene: Warm Midwestern hospitality. International student community exists but the culture is predominantly American. Soccer team is a tight brotherhood — Big Ten culture means athletes are respected on campus. Academic atmosphere is serious but social.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★ Bloomington is not a city and winters are cold. But the campus energy, athletics culture, and Midwestern warmth make it surprisingly enjoyable. Best if Olivier embraces the quintessential American college experience.

facilityDetails.stadium: Bill Armstrong Stadium — 10,000 capacity, natural grass surface (annually re-sodded), full broadcast infrastructure. Home of 8 NCAA championships. One of the most storied soccer venues in American collegiate history.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 4 dedicated training fields adjacent to Armstrong Stadium (3 natural grass, 1 synthetic turf). Indoor practice space in Cook Hall for winter months. GPS tracking zones permanently installed on all surfaces.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: Simon Skjodt Assembly Hall adjacent Athletic Performance Center — 22,000 sq ft weight facility. Olympic lifting platforms (14), Keiser full system, Hammer Strength equipment. Dedicated strength and conditioning coaches for all Olympic sports. Cryotherapy chambers, normatec recovery, altitude tent room, hyperbaric oxygen chamber.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: IU School of Public Health Kinesiology Labs — 9 dedicated research and teaching laboratories including: bioenergetics and environmental stress suite (unique in the USA — altitude simulation and heat chamber combined), biomechanics lab (12-camera motion capture, 6 force plates), muscle physiology lab (muscle biopsy capability), motor control and coordination lab, cardiovascular physiology lab. GPS tracking (Catapult Vector) with real-time HRV monitoring on all sessions.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: Indiana Athletics Sports Medicine — multiple certified athletic trainers. IU Health (University Hospital affiliate) team physician access. Sports concussion research lab on campus. One of the few programs in the guide with a dedicated motor control rehabilitation research lab that doubles as a clinical resource.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: IU Kinesiology: 9 research labs accessible to undergraduates. The bioenergetics and environmental stress lab is the only one of its kind at an American university — nowhere else can simulate altitude AND heat stress simultaneously for research. Students working with faculty on research from Year 1 is the norm, not exception.
facilityDetails.extras: Assembly Hall (17,000 cap basketball) creates extraordinary game-day atmosphere. IU Memorial Union — one of the largest student unions in the USA. IU Outdoor Pool and Wellness Centre. Jacobs School of Music (world-famous) for cultural events. Bloomington itself surprises visitors — voted one of the best college towns in America.
facilityDetails.note: Indiana is the #2 facilities environment in this guide for Olivier's specific needs. Bill Armstrong Stadium has hosted 8 NCAA Championship games. The bioenergetics lab is unique in USA collegiate sport. The combination of soccer tradition, science infrastructure, and personal development environment is exceptional.

coach.name: Todd Yeagley
coach.title: Head Coach (16th season 2026)
coach.profile: 16th season at Indiana 2026. Son of legendary Jerry Yeagley. 2012 NCAA National Champion (first #16 seed ever to win championship). 39 MLS draftees under him. 11 Big Ten Championships. 4 Big Ten CoY. 4 consecutive Big Ten Tourn titles 2020-23. 2025: missed Big Ten Tourn but received NCAA at-large bid. Former Columbus Crew MLS player. IU All-American 1991-94.

facilities: School of Public Health Kinesiology Labs
rec: Most decorated soccer program in USA history. Best motor control coverage in this guide (9 labs). Aidan Morris (USMNT) developed here. Bloomington is a classic college town — not a city — and climate is cold. For development and pro pathway if he can compete at Big Ten level.

staff.name: Christian Lomeli
staff.bg: Full-time assistant. Player development and recruiting.

name: Penn State
acuAlignNote: Strong kinesiology — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, motor control all covered. Pre-PT advising integrated into kinesiology program.

gpa.note: Large public research university. Athletic scholarship pathway well-established for internationals.

confRecord.note: Did not qualify for Big Ten Tournament.
Big Ten conference play. NCAA Tournament.
Lost to Indiana in Big Ten Tournament Final.

coach.name: Bob Warming
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: One of the most decorated coaches in Big Ten history. Multiple NCAA tournament runs.

rec: Consistent Big Ten contender. Strong kinesiology program. Rural campus — significant lifestyle trade-off for Olivier.

name: Michigan
acuAlignNote: Excellent — U of M School of Kinesiology is one of the top 3 in the nation. Movement Science covers anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, motor control, sport psychology. Michigan Medicine provides elite pre-PT clinical access.

gpa.note: Highly selective public university. Athletic scholarship pathway available for international recruits.

confRecord.note: 3rd seed Big Ten Tourn. Lost final to UCLA 0-5.
Big Ten Tournament participant. NCAA bid.

coach.name: Chaka Daley
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Building Michigan into an elite Big Ten program. Former US Youth National Team coach.

rec: One of the best Movement Science programs in the country. Michigan Medicine pre-PT access is elite. Ann Arbor is a lively college town despite cold winters.

name: Michigan State
acuAlignNote: Solid kinesiology — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics covered. Pre-PT pathway available through kinesiology advising.

gpa.note: Accessible large public university. International athlete process well-established.

confRecord.note: Did not qualify for Big Ten Tournament.

coach.name: Damon Rensing
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Long-tenured MSU coach. Consistent program in competitive Big Ten environment.

rec: Mid-tier Big Ten. Best for realistic minutes among Michigan schools. Cold campus — similar drawbacks to Michigan.

name: Ohio State
acuAlignNote: Solid exercise science — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics covered. Ohio State Wexner Medical Center provides strong clinical access for pre-PT pathway.

gpa.note: Large public university. Accessible admission for strong international athletes.

confRecord.note: Defending B1G Tourn champs but failed to qualify in 2025.
2023 Big Ten co-regular season champs. Tournament.
Big Ten regular season and tournament titles.

coach.name: Brian Maisonneuve
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Former MLS and US National Team player. Building Ohio State's soccer identity.

rec: Columbus is a real, growing city — good lifestyle for a Midwest option. Wexner Medical Center for pre-PT. Reasonable cost.

name: Northwestern
acuAlignNote: Strong human sciences and kinesiology pathways. Adjacent to Chicago — access to top-tier PT programs and clinical facilities.

gpa.note: Highly selective private university. Elite academic profile required alongside athletic ability.

confRecord.note: Beat Indiana 2-0 late season. Missed Big Ten Tournament.

coach.name: Tim Lenahan
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Long-tenured Northwestern coach. Chicago proximity creates strong pre-professional opportunities.

rec: Elite academics + Chicago access. Soccer is competitive not elite — more realistic minutes than top Big Ten programs. Very expensive.

name: Wisconsin
acuAlignNote: Solid exercise and movement science — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, sport psychology covered. UW Health access for clinical placements.

gpa.note: Accessible large public university. Strong athletic department support.

confRecord.note: Did not qualify for Big Ten Tournament. 5-6 overall.

coach.name: John Trask
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Developing Wisconsin program in a competitive Big Ten field.

rec: Lower-cost Big Ten option. Best for minutes opportunity among mid-tier programs. Cold Wisconsin winters are a significant drawback.

name: Rutgers
acuAlignNote: Solid exercise science program. NYC proximity means excellent clinical placement opportunities for pre-PT pathway.

gpa.note: Accessible large public university. Athletic scholarship packages standard for internationals.

confRecord.note: RPI No.38. Strong season. NCAA at-large bid.

coach.name: Jim McElderry
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Long-tenured Rutgers coach. NYC proximity creates unique professional networking for soccer players.

rec: NYC proximity is a genuine advantage. Mid-tier Big Ten program. Historically strong in Big East era — still rebuilding in Big Ten.

name: Oregon
acuAlignNote: Strong Human Physiology program — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, exercise science all well-covered. Pre-PT pathway supported.

gpa.note: Accessible Pacific Northwest public university. International athletic recruitment well-established.

confRecord.note: First full Big Ten season (joined 2024). Did not qualify for tournament.
Pac-12 play before joining Big Ten.

coach.name: Wilfried Grabherr
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Building Oregon through Big Ten transition. Strong Human Physiology academic pathway.

rec: Best minutes opportunity in the Big Ten. Strong human physiology degree. Pacific Northwest climate is rainy — not ideal for Olivier.

name: USC
acuAlignNote: Strong kinesiology — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, sport psychology covered. USC Keck Medicine provides outstanding clinical access for pre-PT pathway.

gpa.note: Selective private university. Athletic scholarship is primary aid lever for internationals.

confRecord.note: Did not qualify for Big Ten Tournament.
Pac-12 play before joining Big Ten.

coach.name: Neil Jones
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Strong Pac-12 record translating into Big Ten competition. LA network gives unique pro soccer access.

rec: LA lifestyle — second best after UCLA for Olivier's climate preference. USC Keck Medicine for pre-PT. Expensive but worth considering alongside UCLA.

name: Washington
acuAlignNote: Solid kinesiology — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics covered. UW Medicine provides strong clinical access for pre-PT pathway.

gpa.note: Selective public university. International athletes well-supported through athletic department.

confRecord.note: Beat UCLA at home — key win vs eventual B1G Tourn champs.

coach.name: Jamie Clark
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Building Washington through Pacific-12 to Big Ten transition. Seattle Sounders relationship a pro pathway asset.

rec: Seattle city lifestyle. Sounders proximity a pro soccer bonus. Rain is a genuine drawback for Olivier. Mid-range cost.

name: Illinois
acuAlignNote: Solid kinesiology program — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics covered. Pre-PT pathway available.

gpa.note: Accessible large public university. Athletic support department strong.

confRecord.note: Did not qualify for Big Ten Tournament.

coach.name: Mark Boos
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Rebuilding Illinois program in competitive Big Ten. Rural Champaign campus.

rec: Most accessible minutes in the Big Ten. Rural flat campus — low lifestyle fit for Olivier. Main draw is playing time and lower academic bar.
